Package org.eventb.core.ast.datatype

Interface IConstructorArgument

All Known Subinterfaces:
IDestructorExtension
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConstructorArgument, DestructorExtension
public interface IConstructorArgument
Common protocol for arguments of datatype constructors. Constructors can take two kind of arguments:
  • anonymous arguments which are passed to the constructor but whose value can no longer be obtained from the constructed value;
  • named arguments that are also a destructor that allows to retrieve their value from the constructed value.
Since:
3.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IDestructorExtension
    asDestructor()
    Returns this argument as a destructor, or null if this argument is not a destructor.
    IConstructorExtension
    getConstructor()
    The constructor extension of which this object is an argument.
    IDatatype
    getOrigin()
    Returns the datatype to which this constructor argument belongs.
    Expression
    getSet(ISetInstantiation instantiation)
    Returns the set of this argument in the given instantiation, that is the set to which this argument must belong such that a value constructed with this argument belongs to the set given at instantiation creation.
    Type
    getType(ITypeInstantiation instantiation)
    Returns the type of this argument in the given instantiation.
    boolean
    isDestructor()
    Tells whether this argument can be retrieved from a datatype value.

  • Method Details

    • getOrigin

      IDatatype getOrigin()
      Returns the datatype to which this constructor argument belongs.
      Returns:
      the datatype of this constructor argument

    • getConstructor

      IConstructorExtension getConstructor()
      The constructor extension of which this object is an argument.
      Returns:
      the datatype constructor

    • isDestructor

      boolean isDestructor()
      Tells whether this argument can be retrieved from a datatype value.
      Returns:
      true iff this argument is also a destructor

    • asDestructor

      IDestructorExtension asDestructor()
      Returns this argument as a destructor, or null if this argument is not a destructor.
      Returns:
      this argument as a destructor, or null

    • getType

      Type getType(ITypeInstantiation instantiation)
      Returns the type of this argument in the given instantiation.
      Parameters:
      instantiation - a type instantiation obtained from the datatype of this argument
      Returns:
      the type of this argument in the given instantiation
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instantiation comes from a different origin

    • getSet

      Expression getSet(ISetInstantiation instantiation)
      Returns the set of this argument in the given instantiation, that is the set to which this argument must belong such that a value constructed with this argument belongs to the set given at instantiation creation.
      Parameters:
      instantiation - a set instantiation obtained from the datatype of this argument
      Returns:
      the set of this argument in the given instantiation
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instantiation comes from a different origin
